title: Charter: Solid Q4 Earnings Growth Despite Lower Net Adds
text: Charter: Solid Q4 Earnings Growth Despite Lower Net Adds

title: Charter Communications fourth-quarter results are below estimates
text: Charter Communications (NASDAQ: CHTR) reports $8.93 EPS in the fourth quarter, which is $1.97 better than the $6.96 estimate made by financial analysts. However, revenue in the quarter came to about $13.2 billion and was also slightly lower than the $13.25 billion estimates.

title: Charter's (CHTR) Q4 Earnings Top Estimates, Revenues Up Y/Y
text: Charter's (CHTR) fourth-quarter 2021 results reflect continued new customer additions as well as growth in residential, mobile and commercial revenues.

title: Charter Communications (CHTR) Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates
text: Charter (CHTR) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 29.23% and 0.33%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Charter Communications Q4 Bottom-Line Tops Consensus
text: Charter Communications Inc (NASDAQ: CHTR) reported fourth-quarter FY21 revenue growth of 4.7% year-on-year, to $13.21 billion, missing the consensus of $13.25 billion. Revenue growth of 5.1% in Residential, 47.5% in Mobile, and 4.8% in Commercial drove the top-line performance.

title: Earnings Results: Charter earnings show growth in internet and mobile but declines in voice and video
text: Shares of Charter Communications Inc. edged higher in premarket trading Friday after the company continued to show growth in its internet and mobile subscriber bases but saw declines in voice and video.

title: Charter Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2021 Results
text: STAMFORD, Conn., Jan. 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Charter Communications, Inc. (along with its subsidiaries, the "Company" or "Charter") today reported financial and operating results for the three and twelve months ended December 31, 2021.

title: Charter Closes $1.2 Billion Senior Unsecured Notes
text: STAMFORD, Conn., Jan. 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Charter Communications, Inc. (NASDAQ: CHTR) (along with its subsidiaries, "Charter") today announced that its subsidiaries, CCO Holdings, LLC and CCO Holdings Capital Corp., have closed on $1.2 billion in aggregate principal amount of senior unsecured notes due 2032 (the "Notes").

title: SoFi stock soars after company gains approval for bank charter — ‘a major step forward'
text: Shares of SoFi Technologies Inc. surged in after-hours trading Tuesday after the financial-technology company said that it won regulatory approval to become a bank-holding company.

title: SOFI Stock: 11 Reasons Why Investors Are Banking On a SoFi Bank Charter
text: SoFi Technologies (SOFI) stock is on the move Tuesday as investors discuss a bank charter for the company and what it could do to the stock. The post SOFI Stock: 11 Reasons Why Investors Are Banking On a SoFi Bank Charter appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Charter to Hold Webcast to Discuss Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2021 Financial and Operating Results

title: Charter Prices $1.2 Billion Senior Unsecured Notes
text: STAMFORD, Conn., Jan. 13, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Charter Communications, Inc. (NASDAQ: CHTR) (along with its subsidiaries, "Charter") today announced that its subsidiaries, CCO Holdings, LLC and CCO Holdings Capital Corp. (collectively, the "Issuers"), have priced $1.2 billion in aggregate principal amount of senior unsecured notes due 2032 (the "Notes").

title: 3 Cable Stocks to Watch Out For in a Challenging Industry
text: Cable television industry participants like Comcast (CMCSA), Charter Communications (CHTR) and DISH are benefiting from growing demand for high-speed Internet and increased consumption of media amid significant cord-cutting.

title: Librarian Capital's Monthly Top Buys And Price Moves - January 2022
text: Tobacco stocks remain strong buys after the defeat of the U.S. "nicotine tax" proposal and a reassuring update from British American Tobacco. In Payment, Mastercard and Visa each rebounded by more than 10%; U.S. holiday retail sales were strong and credit cards kept growing.
